ABOUT TAYLOR

Competitive. Versatile. Team-first.

Taylor is a competitive setter who enjoys leading an offense, creating scoring opportunities for her teammates, and making strong decisions under pressure. She brings energy, consistency, and a team-first mindset to every match.

Her experience playing both setter and opposite gives her versatility and a broader understanding of offensive rhythm, hitter needs, and team execution.
